title: psilobium tomentosum
intro: Psilobium tomentosum, also known as Prunella tomentosa or self-heal, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Psilobium tomentosum include wound healing, immune system support, and the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Psilobium tomentosum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
